User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /temp_components/

# Allow important pages
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /portfolio
Allow: /pricing-2025
Allow: /comprehensive-2025-services-showcase
Allow: /whitepapers
Allow: /quantum-neural-network-platform
Allow: /autonomous-business-operations-platform
Allow: /ai-powered-it-asset-management

# Crawl delay
=======
# Crawl-delay
Crawl-delay: 1

# Specific rules for major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Block AI training bots
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /

User-agent: Omgilibot
Disallow: /
